utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , that is a fire . Oh yeah . Oh yeah .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Excuse me , I am sorry , I am gonna have to call you back , I have got a Schemp in my office .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But ah , hey , oh , somebody off the phone , how bout a glass of wine by the fire , I could get it going again .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross you are not listening to me , I do not have time to stop .

emotion_cause.span: 6_you are not listening to me , I do not have time to stop .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Come on Rach , you do not have what , ten minutes ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not have ten minutes ! !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ? Sophie , does she have ten minutes ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey , Ross ! ! ! I told you I do not !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Do not yell at me okay , this is the most I have seen you all week .

utterances.text: Look , I cannot do this right now , okay , I have got a deadline , would you just go home , I will talk to you later .

utterances.text: Actually , that is our three hole punch .
